notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper physics, AI, audio, pause, and game states; minor issue is serve direction logic sends ball toward loser instead of winner, but overall very polished.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Pong with complete game states, scaling difficulty, synthesized sound effects, and solid collision logic.

A solid and mostly complete Pong clone with correct core mechanics and no obvious runtime faults, but it is still fairly basic and has some tuning/design imperfections that keep it from feeling polished or flawless.
